mapper.select: select id, level_code as code, level_name as name, sort_order from crm_customer_level where status = '0' order by sort_order
select id, stage_code as code, stage_name as name, sort_order from crm_opportunity_stage where status = '0' order by sort_order
select id, type_code as code, type_name as name, sort_order from crm_contact_type where status = '0' order by sort_order
select id, status_code as code, status_name as name, sort_order from crm_contract_status where status = '0' order by sort_order
